task_completion.description: Verify that the new pipeline named 'TailwindTraders-Prod' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'TailwindTraders-Prod' in the Azure DevOps Pipelines list or at the top of the pipeline editor interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Variables tab of the new pipeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the pipeline editor interface with the 'Variables' tab selected and active.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'buildConfiguration' variable is set to 'release'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Variables tab, look for a row with the name 'buildConfiguration' and its corresponding value field containing the text 'release'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Triggers tab of the new pipeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the pipeline editor interface with the 'Triggers' tab selected and active.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Continuous Integration (CI) trigger is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Triggers tab, under the 'Continuous integration' section, look for the 'Enable continuous integration' checkbox and ensure it is unchecked/disabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web-based GUI to configure the pipeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps Server interface, rather than terminal windows executing API commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Azure DevOps application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard Azure DevOps Server 2022 elements (menus, pipeline editor, tabs) and not a text editor or local document containing the expected answers.

integrity.description: Verify that the pipeline changes were saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking the 'Save' or 'Save & queue' button, or a notification indicating the pipeline was successfully saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates in Azure DevOps Server 2022 Express. The target project is 'TailwindTraders'. The agent must create a new pipeline named 'TailwindTraders-Prod'. The pipeline variable to modify is 'buildConfiguration' and its value must be exactly 'release'. The Continuous Integration (CI) trigger must be disabled (unchecked) in the Triggers tab so the pipeline only runs manually.
